criteria.failure: The first attention row differs from expected_top_attention_id.
Fewer than 95 percent of project, run, phase, owner, next milestone and health answers are identified within 10 seconds.
Any required view or action lacks keyboard or mouse access, visible focus, scrolling, resizing or configurable capture/text selection.
Urgency depends on colour or a projected fact lacks source, revision and freshness.
The Console infers a percentage from messages, elapsed time or activity.
Mouse or conversational input duplicates a command, bypasses review/confirmation or consumes an attention item without authority.

aggregation: Each fixture/repetition passes only when every criterion passes; metric values are recomputed from retained case rows.
